description: Лиофилизированные культуры прямого внесения Golden Line® представляют собой композиции микроорганизмов для гомо- и гетероферментативного молочнокислого брожения, разработанные с применением последних достижений в области микробиологии и биотехнологии. Они предназначены для промышленного производства кисломолочных продуктов с постоянными органолептическими и физико-химическими свойствами, а также возможностью длительного хранения благодаря тщательно подобранным композициям штаммов.

starter_cultures.description: Golden Line® starter cultures enable the production of fermented milk products with diverse taste properties, aroma, and texture. The culture compositions ensure stable manifestation of organoleptic characteristics after ripening and throughout the entire shelf life, taking into account the specifics of each product, technological regimes, and clot formation characteristics. These cultures are applied in various products like yogurt, fermented milk products, ryazhenka, kefir, cottage cheese, and cheeses, and their compositions include various strains such as Streptococcus salivarius subsp. thermophilus, Lactobacillus delbrueckii subsp. bulgaricus, Lactobacillus casei, Lactobacillus acidophilus, Bifidobacterium bifidum, Bifidobacterium animalis subsp. lactis, Bifidobacterium longum, Lactococcus lactis subsp. lactis biovar diacetylactis, Lactococcus lactis subsp. lactis, Leuconostoc mesenteroides subsp. mesenteroides, Lactobacillus rhamnosus, Lactobacillus paracasei subsp. paracasei, Debaryomyces hansenii, Kluyveromyces marxianus, Lactobacillus helveticus, Propionibacterium freudenreichii ssp. shermanii, Lactobacillus plantarum, and Lactobacillus reuteri. Key advantages include ensuring viscous and dense structures, reducing syneresis, providing stable consistency, offering low post-acidification, imparting specific flavor profiles (yogurt, creamy, balanced kefir), facilitating curd formation, and being suitable for various applications including lactose-free and plant-based products.

protective_cultures.description: Golden Line® protective cultures from NPO Green Lines are designed for fermented milk products and cheeses, ensuring a 100% natural composition and extended shelf life. The cultures contain lactic acid microorganisms that produce bacteriostatic substances and are characterized by high viability, cold and salt resistance, and a pronounced antagonistic effect against undesirable microflora, without affecting the organoleptic properties or production technology. They are particularly active against yeasts, molds, coliforms (including E.coli), and S. aureus, and can also help prevent early and late blowing in cheeses.

probiotic_cultures.description: Golden Line® probiotic cultures from NPO Green Lines are designed to enrich a wide range of fermented milk products (bio-sour cream, bio-yogurt, bio-kefir, etc.). These Russian-origin cultures withstand aggressive gastrointestinal tract conditions, providing beneficial effects: high adhesiveness, promotion of calcium and iron absorption, and antagonistic activity against pathogens. They are used as additional cultures, not replacing the main starter, and ensure a guaranteed content of probiotic microorganisms (Lactobacillus ≥1×10⁷, Bifidobacterium ≥1×10⁶ CFU/g) in the finished product. The effectiveness of the strains has been confirmed by clinical trials. They are also suitable for vegan product manufacturing.
